subject: grammar
title: Regrets: Wish and Should
instruction: Fill in the gaps using wish or should and the words in brackets in the correct form.
passage:
1 You shouldn't have left (not/leave) school so young. You'd have a better job now.
2 I really 1 [1] (you/ask) me before borrowing the car yesterday. I needed to use it.
3 I'm not enjoying my degree course at all. I 2 [2] (I/not/choose) physics. I 3 [3] (choose) maths instead because I used to love it at school.
4 I 4 [4] (I/study) languages at school because now I travel regularly for work to Berlin and Paris.
5 That man is really annoying me. I 5 [5] (he/stop) whistling.
6 We're lost again. We always get lost when you have the map. You 6 [6] (let) me have the map from the start!
7 I 7 [7] (I/have) more time to work on this assignment. I'm worried I won't finish it by the deadline.
8 I 8 [8] (it/stop) raining. I want to go for a walk.
9 I have terrible problems with my knees. I 9 [9] (I/not/do) so much running when I was younger.
10 You 10 [10] (not/tell) Paula about the party - it was meant to be a surprise.

questions.answer: wish you'd asked|||wish you had asked
wish I hadn't chosen|||wish I had not chosen|||shouldn't have chosen|||should not have chosen
wish I'd studied|||wish I had studied
wish he'd stop|||wish he would stop
wish I hadn't done|||wish I had not done|||shouldn't have done|||should not have done
shouldn't have told|||should not have told
